case_title: AVIATION MAINTENANCE SERVICES & SALES VS SCENIC AIR TOURS

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCENIC AIR TOURS
